# v0.1.23

This release improves interactive observability so `akernel` feels closer to a modern coding agent CLI.

## Added

- Context assembly progress with memory/skill counts and token budget use.
- Action lifecycle progress for `write_file`, `patch_file`, `batch_patch`, `run_command`, and `mcp_call`.
- Generated-code materialization progress when code-block responses are saved into files.
- Recovery-context progress after failed tool actions.

## Changed

- The spinner and classic progress output now describe the current operation in human-readable language.
